# Tuyue Media Gateway (TMG) — China Digital Advertising Agency
> One interface, all China ad platforms, zero complexity.

## About
TMG helps international agencies and brands run programmatic advertising across China's major platforms: Baidu, WeChat, Douyin, Xiaohongshu, Bilibili, and Bing China.

## Core Pages

| Page | URL | Description |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Home | https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/ | China digital advertising agency landing page |
| Services | https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/services/ | Overview of all China ad platform services |
| Baidu SEM | https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/services/baidu/ | Baidu search advertising, demographics, ad formats |
| WeChat Ads | https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/services/wechat/ | WeChat ecosystem advertising (Moments, Mini Programs, OA) |
| Douyin Ads | https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/services/douyin/ | Douyin (TikTok China) advertising with 600M+ DAU insights |
| Xiaohongshu Ads | https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/services/xiaohongshu/ | Xiaohongshu (RED) influencer & native ads |
| Bilibili Ads | https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/services/bilibili/ | Bilibili advertising targeting Gen Z audience |
| Bing China Ads | https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/services/bing/ | Bing China premium audience advertising |
| GEO Services | https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/geo/ | Generative Engine Optimization services |
| Pricing | https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/pricing/ | Agency service pricing & packages |
| Client Stories | https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/client-stories/ | Case studies and client results |
| FAQ | https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/faqs/ | Frequently asked questions about China ad platforms |
| About | https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/about/ | Agency background and team information |
| Contact | https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/contact/ | Get in touch for China advertising support |

## Popular Blog Articles

- [China Mobile Internet Spring 2026](https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/blog/china-mobile-internet-spring-2026/) — Latest mobile internet trends and stats
- [Baidu Demographics: 735M+ Users](https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/blog/baidu-demographics-who-are-these-735m-users/) — Baidu Search user demographics and behavior
- [Bilibili Demographics: Gen Z Users](https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/blog/bilibili-demographics-who-are-these-gen-z-users/) — Bilibili's Gen Z audience profile
- [Xiaohongshu Demographics: 350M+ MAU](https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/blog/xiaohongshu-demographics-who-are-these-350m-users/) — Xiaohongshu user demographics
- [Kuaishou Demographics: 400M+ Users](https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/blog/kuaishou-demographics-who-are-these-400m-users/) — Kuaishou user demographics
- [Bing China Demographics](https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/blog/bing-china-demographics-who-are-these-users/) — Bing China premium audience profile
- [Doubao Paid: What It Means for GEO](https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/blog/doubao-paid-what-it-means-for-geo/) — Implications of Doubao's paid model for GEO
- [GEO Channel Weight 2026](https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/blog/geo-channel-weight-2026/) — GEO channel weight analysis for 2026
- [Ocean Engine Overview](https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/blog/ocean-engine-overview/) — Complete guide to ByteDance's Ocean Engine
- [CPM vs oCPM vs eCPM Explained](https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/blog/cpm-ocpm-ecpm-explained/) — China ad pricing models compared
- [CPM Is Rising: Is That Bad?](https://www.tuyuesouxin.cn/blog/cpm-is-rising-bad/) — Analysis of rising CPM trends in China
